signals.message: seeneyu project structure initialized. All role CLAUDE.md files created. Shared state ready. Your first task: run sprint planning for Phase 0 (project setup) and assign M1 tasks to Designer.
M1 Design System passed Tester review. All 4 deliverables verified. Phase gate met.
M2 Data Pipeline v1 passed Tester review with condition: YouTube IDs need verification before DB seed. Structure and curation approved.
M1 Design System delivered in full.
Data Engineer session complete. Full M2 pipeline infrastructure delivered. M2 blocked only on YOUTUBE_API_KEY.

UI Review complete for M6 pre-launch. Overall: implementation is excellent — design system 100% correct, landing/library/clip-viewer all spec-compliant. TWO P0 issues need fixing before launch: (1) RecordPage missing split view — learner can't see reference clip while recording, defeating the mimic mechanic. Fix: add YouTube embed left-panel to the record page layout. (2) RecordClient missing 3-2-1 countdown — users are surprised into recording. Fix: ~20 lines to add countdown state. P1 (post-launch): FeedbackPage missing video comparison row. Full findings at: .shared/outputs/design/ui-review-m6.md
p0_fixes: RecordPage split view (reference clip + webcam) — src/app/library/[clipId]/record/

signals.message: Applied all P0 fixes from designer's M6 UI review plus one additional critical bug.
Builder role created by Designer.
Backend Engineer role created.
All 10 items from designer's M6 UI review are now fully implemented. App is ready for M6 final tester sign-off.
M7 (Auth System) and M8 (Admin CMS) fully implemented. Build: 0 TypeScript errors, 0 Next.js errors.
M7 Auth System — APPROVED. 10/10 test cases pass.
M8 Admin CMS — APPROVED. 10/10 test cases pass. ONE MEDIUM BUG FILED (BUG-001): ClipForm score dimension fields allow 1–10 but model expects 1–3. Non-blocking.
Reporter session complete (2026-03-22). All documentation current.
Reporter check-in. All docs current. M7+M8 awaiting PM action.
BUG-002 (CRITICAL) found and fixed. Library page 'Couldn't load clips' error — ClipCard.tsx missing 'use client'. Fix applied, library page now renders all 15 clips.

M10 UI specs delivered. Three components fully specified with ASCII mockups, Tailwind class lists, props interfaces, state definitions, accessibility notes, and page layout context.

Deliverables:
- CharacterBanner: coaching-card style banner for record page
- ScriptPanel: dialogue/action script display for record page
- ActionPlan: prioritized improvement steps for feedback page

Artifact: .shared/outputs/design/m10-spec.md
Signal sent to Backend Engineer to unblock implementation.

M10 script prep complete. All 15 clip scripts written and saved to .shared/outputs/data/clips-seed.json. Eye-contact/posture/listening clips use 4-step physical instruction lists; vocal-pacing/confident-disagreement clips use exact dialogue scripts. seed.ts update (3 lines) and npx prisma db seed will execute immediately once Backend Engineer signals that `script` field is live in schema. Checkpoint: .shared/outputs/data/checkpoints/m10-script-seeding.json
signals.blocking_on: backend-engineer Task 1 (schema update) + Task 7 (signal to data-engineer)

signals.message:
M10 fully implemented. Build: 0 TypeScript errors.

Completed:
- BUG-001 fixed: ClipForm score dimensions 1-3, difficultyScore 4-12
- Schema: script String? @db.Text added to Clip
- Types: ActionPlanStep + steps[] in FeedbackResult + script in Clip
- Feedback API: character/script context in prompt, steps[] schema, no-frames fallback
- tailwind.config.ts: fade-in-up keyframe
- CharacterBanner + ScriptPanel components created
- Record page: CharacterBanner + ScriptPanel
- Feedback page: ActionPlan section
- ClipForm: Script/Dialogue textarea
- Data Engineer signaled: schema ready, pending user db:push

PENDING USER ACTIONS:
1. npm run db:push — apply script field to DB
2. npx prisma generate — regenerate client
(Casts in code will clean up automatically after regen)

M10 script seeding task complete (code). All 15 clip scripts written to clips-seed.json. seed.ts updated with script field support + patch logic for already-seeded clips. Blocked only on user running: (1) npm run db:push, (2) npx prisma generate, (3) npx prisma db seed. After those three commands, all 15 clips will have script field populated in the database. Checkpoint: .shared/outputs/data/checkpoints/m10-script-seeding.json

Designer UI review of M10 implementation complete. Verdict: PASS — all 3 components spec-compliant, no P0/P1 issues found. Two low-priority post-launch items logged: (1) CharacterBanner 'animate-fade-in' keyframe may need to be added to tailwind config. (2) ScriptPanel action-list mode not used for physical-skill clips — future improvement via adding scriptType field to Clip schema. Full review at: .shared/outputs/design/ui-review-m10.md. Tester has been notified.
